title: Desktop Metal Commences Shipments of Production System P-50 With Inaugural Customer Stanley Black & Decker
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #3Dprint--Desktop Metal (NYSE:DM) today announced it has shipped its first Production System™ P-50 printer to Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), marking the commercialization of the company's flagship additive manufacturing technology for mass production of end-use, metal parts. title: A Toast to Innovation: BLACK+DECKER® and Bartesian™ Shake Up Craft Cocktails with bev by BLACK+DECKER™
